The '''Action-Keynne XII transport''' was a [[Bulk transport/Legends|bulk transport]] built by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].

==Characteristics==
It was noted for its luxurious crew accommodations and, in a radical departure from previous [[Action series/Legends|Action series]] transports, it mounted armament on par with a small [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]].

==History==
The Action-Keynne XII was an expensive ship, used primarily by the wealthy [[Sarkan/Legends|Sarkans]] to ship only their most valuable cargo.
When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] went to the [[Iphigini]] homeworld, [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] called a customs alert on an Action-Keyenne transport to distract Iphigini security whilst they slipped in.

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
